title: NBA 2026 postseason preview: Matchups, biggest questions and what to know
content: Everything you need to know for the Thunder, Pistons, Spurs, Celtics and 16 other teams chasing the 2026 NBA title.

title: Rivers out as Bucks coach after three seasons
content: Doc Rivers is out as the head coach of the Bucks, but the franchise and Rivers are discussing whether he will move to an advisory role in the organization, sources said.

title: Rory prevails, becomes 4th to repeat at Masters
content: The green jacket is Rory McIlroy's again. He won the Masters on Sunday by one shot, becoming the first back-to-back winner since Tiger Woods in 2001-02.

title: Report: Ex-Canes DE Bain drove in fatal car crash
content: Former Miami defensive end and 2026 NFL draft prospect Rueben Bain Jr. was involved in an auto accident in 2024 in which a passenger later died because of injuries sustained in the crash, according to a report published on Sunday.

title: Flagg's rookie season ends with sprained ankle
content: Cooper Flagg, the No. 1 pick and Rookie of the Year favorite, sustained the injury early in the second quarter of the Mavericks' regular-season finale.

title: Giannis vents about Bucks, won't rule out return
content: Giannis Antetokounmpo gave contradicting messages about his future after a disappointing Bucks season, expressing frustration with where they are while also not ruling out the possibility of a return.

title: Fans give KG big welcome in his return to Wolves
content: Timberwolves franchise icon Kevin Garnett made a special appearance for fan appreciation night in the team's regular-season finale Sunday, receiving a roar from the crowd and patting his heart with his hand after player introductions.

title: Yelich exits hurt as Brewers expecting 'bad news'
content: Christian Yelich left the Milwaukee Brewers' game against the Washington Nationals on Sunday with tightness in his left hamstring.

title: Ovi lauds Penguins but waves off farewell shakes
content: After Washington's 3-0 loss to Pittsburgh on Sunday, Capitals star Alex Ovechkin, considering retirement after the season, waved off potential farewell handshakes with Sidney Crosby and the rest of the Penguins, who lingered after the win to salute him.

title: 🏈 NFL draft: Seven prospects climbing boards
content: Dillon Thieneman and Monroe Freeling have drastically boosted their stock since the start of last season. Who else has climbed the board?

title: 'I don't make it easy': How Rory McIlroy won back-to-back Masters
content: After seeing a six-shot lead erased on Saturday, McIlroy still found a way to secure his second green jacket.﻿

title: WNBA mock draft: It's draft day! And there's a new No. 1 in final projection
content: WNBA draft day is here! We project all three rounds. Four UCLA players and a South Carolina trio help make up Round 1.

title: 'He turned into the Black Mamba': Inside Kobe Bryant's 60-point farewell
content: From teammates and opponents to coaches, officials and staff, those who were there remember how Bryant's last game became something no one expected -- and no one will forget.

title: Our annual NFL draft prospect skill superlative list: The one player who excels at each trait
content: Strongest arm? Fastest offensive and defensive playmakers? Quickest first step? Let's hand out superlatives for this NFL draft class.

title: College coaches pick 2026 NFL draft sleepers
content: We know the top talent in the draft, but who could surprise in the pros? We asked their college coaches.

title: Eagles, A.J. Brown intrigue increases as NFL draft nears
content: The Eagles haven't been highly incentivized to move Brown to this point, in large part due to the financials.

title: NHL playoff watch: What's at stake in each of Monday's 10 matchups
content: There isn't much season left to determine playoff seeding and draft lottery order. Here's a rundown of what's on tap.

title: A $1.07 billion series!? Why Mets-Dodgers is most expensive matchup in MLB history
content: When New York and L.A. collide this week, big-money baseball will be on display at a never-seen-before level.

title: NBA coaching carousel: What's next for Milwaukee and every open job?
content: Milwaukee and New Orleans are looking for long-term coaching fits. Here's what lies ahead for each franchise.

title: WNBA free agency and trade tracker: Plum back to Sparks, McBride back to Lynx
content: WNBA free agency is here. Kelsey Plum is returning to Los Angeles. Kayla McBride is returning to Minnesota.

title: Final 2026 NHL Awards Watch: Kucherov takes the lead for MVP
content: Our panel of PHWA voters identify their finalists for all the awards, with some tight finishes in a few spots.

title: Man City revive Premier League race, Inter win 7-goal thriller, more
content: Man City's win at Chelsea and Arsenal's defeat at Bournemouth have thrown the title race wide open -- arguably, it's City's to lose from here. PLUS: Inter Milan show win a seven-goal thriller at Como as Gab Marcotti recaps the weekend.

title: MLB Bat Flip Championship Belt: Who's the first winner of 2026?
content: We're going to name a bat flip champion for 2026. Here's who holds the championship belt after the first battle of the season.

title: Top 10 tips to play and win ESPN fantasy women's basketball like the pros
content: Your guide to research, drafting and roster strategy to play (and win) fantasy women's basketball this season.

title: Fury, Joshua and Wilder are back; what's next for the glamour division?
content: The heavyweight division is buzzing again thanks to Tyson Fury calling out Anthony Joshua and Deontay Wilder's return.

title: MLS Power Rankings: LAFC's first loss of 2026 knocks them off the top
content: LAFC had been practically perfect in 2026, but the Angelenos first loss of the year cleared room for a new No. 1 in this edition of MLS Power Rankings.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Nine Premier League clubs eye Leicester wonderkid
content: Around half the teams in the Premier League want to sign Leicester City winger Jeremy Monga. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: How Iran is using China’s playbook to counter Donald Trump’s threats
content: Nearly six weeks of fighting between Iran and the United States have paused, but tensions remain after talks failed. Donald Trump has increased pressure by threatening to block the Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil route. Iran is responding by using control of the strait as leverage, similar to how China earlier countered US pressure using rare-earth supplies. This has already pushed oil prices higher and raised concerns over fuel costs and inflation. Iran has shown no sign of backing down, signalling a longer standoff ahead

title: TCS CEO on IT dying by 2030: Companies will need more services for AI
content: TCS CEO K Krithivasan dismisses predictions of India's IT sector becoming obsolete by 2030, asserting that AI will amplify the need for IT services. He highlights the industry's resilience due to deep skill sets, not just cost.

title: Abhishek Sharma breaks Rohit Sharma, Sanju Samson 'unwanted' records
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad's Abhishek Sharma was dismissed for a golden duck by Jofra Archer in their IPL 2026 clash against Rajasthan Royals. This marked the 24th instance of RR taking a wicket before conceding a run, an IPL record.

title: Blocking what is already closed: Why Trump is blockading Hormuz Strait
content: President Trump has threatened to blockade the Strait of Hormuz. This move aims to increase pressure on Iran. The waterway is crucial for global oil shipments. Iran has already been limiting access. Trump's action risks further disruption to oil flows. This could lead to higher global oil prices. The US has previously allowed some Iranian oil sales.

title: FBI takes down website that stole millions from internet users across the world
content: A sophisticated global phishing operation, centered around the "W3LL phishing kit," has been dismantled by the FBI and Indonesian authorities. This "full-service" platform enabled cybercriminals to steal thousands of account credentials and attempt over $20 million in fraud. The alleged developer was detained in Indonesia, marking a significant blow to cybercrime.

title: 'Under Sanju bhaiya ... ': Riyan Parag's special mention for Samson at toss
content: Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag, reflecting on his journey to leadership, acknowledged the guidance of former captain Sanju Samson. Parag, who took over captaincy ahead of IPL 2026, expressed gratitude for the support received. Sunrisers Hyderabad skipper Ishan Kishan also discussed the impact of leadership on his game and team performance.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' day 26: Ranveer Singh film chases Rs 1100 crore milestone on 4th Monday
content: Aditya Dhar’s espionage masterpiece, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', continues its record-shattering journey at the box office. On day 26 (fourth Monday), the Ranveer Singh-starrer has officially amassed over Rs 1,084 crore India net, solidifying its status as the highest-grossing Hindi film in history. Despite the intense IPL 2026 season, the film's strategic family-friendly edits and viral momentum have pushed its worldwide gross past the Rs 1,712 crore mark. Check out the detailed live tracking and daily collection breakdown here.

title: US government wants Reddit to share details of the user who criticised ICE
content: The US government has subpoenaed Reddit for the personal details of an anonymous user who posted criticism of ICE. This move, initiated by an ICE agent and escalated to a grand jury, has free speech advocates concerned about the administration's efforts to identify online critics.

title: Out of missiles: US allies in Gulf turn to Asia for more ammo
content: Gulf nations, facing depleted air defence stockpiles due to sustained air bombardment, are urgently seeking alternative weapons suppliers beyond the US. Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Qatar are exploring options from South Korea, Ukraine, and Britain, driven by Iranian retaliatory attacks and US delivery delays. This diversification highlights global arms production strains and a shifting defence landscape.

title: From Rs 60 to Rs 60,000: Study reveals Jallianwala compensation scale, sparks ‘blood money’ debate
content: A study reveals Jallianwala Bagh compensation was calculated by income and dependents, leading to payouts from a few thousand rupees for deaths to under Rs 100 for minor injuries. This formula, linking life value to economic productivity, sparked public debate over "blood money" and colonial accountability.

title: 7th duck of 2026! Abhishek Sharma falls for golden duck against Rajasthan Royals
content: Abhishek Sharma was dismissed for a golden duck by Jofra Archer on the first ball against Rajasthan Royals. This marked his seventh duck in 2026 T20 innings, the most by any player this year. He joins Shikhar Dhawan as the only Sunrisers Hyderabad batters to be out first-ball in an IPL match.

title: From middle finger moment to double over Gukesh: What is next for Nihal?
content: Indian chess prodigy Nihal Sarin brushed off an online opponent’s rude gesture earlier this year, focusing instead on his game. Since then, he has surged in form, reaching a career-high rating of 2723, winning the Menorca Masters, and beating world champion D Gukesh twice. He will now aim to qualify for the Esports World Cup 2026.

title: BCCI makes major IPL 2026 schedule change - Here's what's new
content: The BCCI has revised the IPL 2026 schedule, swapping venues for Gujarat Titans and Chennai Super Kings matches due to upcoming municipal elections in Gujarat on April 26. The April 26 fixture in Ahmedabad will now be played in Chennai, with the return match in May shifting to Ahmedabad.

title: Arjun Tendulkar spotted with wife Saaniya, sister Sara before LSG vs RCB clash - WATCH
content: Lucknow Super Giants, currently sixth in IPL 2026, face Royal Challengers Bengaluru after a home defeat to Gujarat Titans. Captain Rishabh Pant acknowledged the team fell short with the bat, despite backing the experienced lineup. Meanwhile, Arjun Tendulkar was spotted with family, having recently married Saaniya Chandhok.

title: Noida workers protest: Key issues, wages, and other demands; top 10 things to know
content: Factory workers' demands for a wage hike escalated into violent clashes, exposing deep-rooted anger over pay disparities and poor working conditions. The strike paralyzed traffic, stranding thousands and causing significant damage to public and private property. Security forces were deployed to restore normalcy.

title: RCB star penalised for 'disobeying' umpire during Mumbai Indians clash
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru allrounder Tim David faced a penalty for not promptly returning a ball to the umpire during their IPL 2026 match against Mumbai Indians. He was fined 25% of his match fee and received a demerit point for repeatedly disobeying instructions. This occurred after a powerful six altered the ball's shape, requiring a replacement.

title: Ctrl+Alt+Hire: How Delhi crime branch exposed high-tech remote access scam in police exams
content: Delhi Police's crime branch has busted a massive recruitment exam scam, arresting over 16 individuals, including four police officers. The syndicate, operating across multiple states, allegedly compromised Delhi Police and other Staff Selection Commission exams.  Involved insiders facilitated remote desktop cheating, demanding lakhs for guaranteed selections.  The operation has exposed significant vulnerabilities.

title: 'Mummy kasam, ek hi cap hai': KKR star's epic response to fan demand - WATCH
content: Young KKR batter Angkrish Raghuvanshi humorously declined a fan's request for his cap, stating he only receives one. Despite this lighthearted moment, Raghuvanshi has been a standout performer for KKR this season, leading their run charts. However, the team has faced a difficult start to IPL 2026, struggling to secure wins.

title: 'DL and TS': Hyderabad doctor with 'James Bond-like switch' on BMW arrested
content: A doctor in Hyderabad was caught drunk driving with a BMW equipped with a hidden flip number plate. The device allowed him to switch between Delhi and Telangana registration plates, raising suspicions of road tax evasion. Police discovered the manipulation after the doctor refused to provide details, leading to his arrest for drunk driving, cheating, and impersonation.

title: Who to be next Bihar CM? BJP likely to declare face for top post on Tuesday
content: The leadership change will mark a milestone for the BJP, which is set to get its first chief minister in Bihar, the only Hindi heartland state where the top post has so far eluded the party. Even so, party leaders have remained cautious in their public remarks. Dilip Jaiswal, a minister and former Bihar BJP president, said, "It is an emotional moment for us. We hope that Nitish Kumar will continue to offer his guidance to the new government."

title: AFI to take disciplinary action if athletes flout sponsorship rule
content: The Athletics Federation of India (AFI) has made it mandatory for athletes to seek prior approval before signing endorsement deals, citing a need to protect them from unfair contracts. While officials argue the move safeguards uneducated athletes from exploitation, sports lawyers contend federations have no legal standing to govern personal contracts, raising concerns over enforceability and confidentiality.

title: You could be inflamed for years without knowing it: Early signs and simple lifestyle changes
content: Chronic inflammation can be the silent passenger on your health journey, often manifesting as everyday struggles like fatigue and restless nights. This hidden menace may quietly elevate your risk for conditions like diabetes and heart disease. Awareness of subtle indicators—like constant weariness, nagging pains, and digestive troubles—is key.

title: 'There are two options': Hardik Pandya delivers brutal reality check after MI defeat
content: Mumbai Indians faced a third straight loss in IPL 2026. Captain Hardik Pandya addressed the team, emphasizing collective learning over isolation.  The team conceded too many runs, struggling to control matches.  Pandya indicated a need for rethinking strategies and potential tactical shifts.  Mumbai aims to halt its slide in the tournament.

title: How are 890 schools still running without girls’ toilets in Maharashtra?
content: While Maharashtra embraces AI-powered classrooms, a stark reality persists: 890 schools lack separate girls' toilets. This highlights a critical infrastructure gap, with a growing focus on essential facilities like functional toilets, safety, electricity, and campus maintenance to bridge the divide between modern learning and basic needs.

title: Footballer dies after robbers attack team bus
content: Ghanaian footballer Dominic Frimpong has died after armed robbers attacked his Berekum Chelsea FC team bus returning from an away match. Masked gunmen fired at the bus in Ashanti Region, forcing players to flee. Frimpong was shot, later dying in hospital. The Ghana FA called it a tragic loss, mourning the 20-year-old rising star.

title: 'Don't fear him': Pope Leo takes on Trump, says won't back down on war criticism
content: Pope Leo has responded to US President Donald Trump's criticism. The Pope stated he will continue speaking out against war, including the conflict involving Iran. He defended the Vatican's appeals for peace as rooted in Christian teaching. Trump had called the Pope weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy..

title: 'Will respond to bombs with ballots': Amit Shah in Bengal, warns 'jail' for TMC 'goons'
content: Union Home Minister Amit Shah intensified his attack on the TMC in West Bengal, urging voters to respond to violence with ballots and promising to bring the BJP to power. He alleged corruption and a "mafia raj," vowing strict action against "syndicate and cut-money promoters" and illegal immigrants, while also highlighting welfare promises.

title: F1 returning to Greater Noida? Sports minister says 3 companies interested; what we know
content: Sports Minister Mansukh Mandaviya announced efforts to bring Formula 1 back to India in 2027, aiming to resolve tax hurdles that caused its departure in 2013. While the minister expressed confidence, Formula 1 sources indicated an agreement is still distant, though India remains a market of interest.

title: 'Himanta most corrupt in country': Rahul backs Khera as passport row escalates
content: Khera struck Himanta's nerve  after he alleged, in a press conference, the Assam CM's wife held multiple foreign passports, prompting a sharp rebuttal and legal threat from the BJP leader. “We have documents showing that Assam chief minister Himanta Biswa Sarma’s wife Riniki Bhuyan Sharma, holds three passports. The first is a UAE Golden Card, the second an Antigua and Barbuda passport, and the third an Egyptian passport. Two of these belong to Islamic countries, yet they continue to claim religious adherence publicly,” Khera alleged.

title: Delhi woman held for forcing UP cop to convert, marry under ‘rape case’ threat
content: A woman has been arrested in Baghpat for allegedly coercing a police constable into religious conversion and marriage. The constable claims the accused pressured him to change his religion and marry her, threatening to frame him in a rape case if he refused. She is also accused of blackmail and forcing him into religious activities.

title: Former YSRCP leader denies charges of sexual harassment against him
content: Allegations came soon after objections were raised over the alleged encroachment of ₹100 crore worth of land belonging to Theosophical Society in Chittoor, says T.G. Suresh

title: Revanth wants GSDP criterion for delimitation to safeguard South’s interests
content: Revanth Reddy points out that increasing seats by 50% would widen the gap between States like Kerala and Uttar Pradesh

title: Assembly Elections 2026 LIVE: 19 States, Centre have come together to counter me; I am fighting alone for common people, says Mamata
content: Addressing a rally at Suri in Birbhum district, the Trinamool Congress supremo and Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee said the BJP won't be able to win the West Bengal elections using forces from Delhi

title: Kerala dental student’s death highlights growing threat of predatory loan apps
content: Investigators say the student had taken a loan of around ₹14,000 from an app and recovery agents had been contacting him repeatedly. They also purportedly directed calls and messages to a college teacher in an attempt to shame the youngster and coerce repayment

title: Anantapur police book 146 minors for driving, seize vehicles
content: Under “Stop Minor Driving” programme, police have been conducting special inspections to nab minors driving vehicles in the district

title: Deregulation reforms: A.P. govt. to fast-track industrial clearances
content: Stressing the need to reduce complexity in approval, Naidu calls for a faster, transparent, and time-bound process, and removal of outdated laws

title: Planning courses, research in quantum computing, says SRM University Amaravati Vice-Chancellor
content: Prof. Satish Kumar says Amaravati is emerging as a global hub with an indigenous quantum computer and export ambitions in two years

title: Cultivation of Rabi crops reaches record level in Telangana this season
content: Extent of paddy, maize and jowar crops is highest-ever with the State consolidating its position as major partner in country’s food security

title: Coimbatore cable TV operator arrested for telecasting leaked footage of Jana Nayagan
content: The complainant alleged that the movie was broadcast for up to 21 minutes post the interval on March 11, following which TVK cadre intervened.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Total turnout goes up to 79.63% after counting postal ballots
content: These are provisional numbers with service votes yet to be added; Chief Electoral Officer (Kerala) Rathan U. Kelkar rejects allegations of undue delay in the publication of the complete poll data

title: APSRTC asks staff to ensure senior citizens, persons with disability get easy access to reserved seats
content: The decision comes in the wake of rising complaints against unavailability of seats for senior citizens and persons with disabilities; staff has been directed to intervene wherever necessary and ensure such seats are occupied by eligible passengers

title: e-Swathu 2.0 upgraded to resolve key issues, says Priyank Kharge
content: Reviewing the progress of the platform with officials concerned in Bengaluru, the Minister said that 1,52,863 applications have been received across the State so far, of which 1,33,803 applications have been successfully processed

title: Call for a fresh safety audit after CNG bus fire in Kozhikode
content: Passengers urge the Motor Vehicles department to investigate the incident and adopt stringent measures to monitor CNG vehicles

title: Tirupati road safety drive: 40 private buses booked, sleeper bus seized; ₹6 lakh fine imposed
content: Police, Fire and Transport officials book 40 private buses for safety violations in Tirupati; sleeper bus from Chhattisgarh seized for violating AIS-119 norms

title: Two individuals will run Bihar from Gujarat, says Tejashwi
content: RJD leader Tejashwi Yadav says Chief Minister Nitish Kumar has left the Bihar treasury empty and the State cannot pay its MLAs and MLCs; he says the NDA has sidelined Mr. Kumar

title: West Bengal Assembly polls: Father-son duo seeks to restore BJP’s lost ground in North 24 Parganas
content: The father son duo of Arjun Singh and Pawan Singh are both contesting Assembly polls on the BJP ticket from Noapara and Bhatpara Assembly seats in North 24 Parganas district. While Pawan Singh has remained with the BJP, his father Arjun Singh, who wields a considerable influence has often switched sides between BJP and the TMC.

title: Asha Bhosle cremated with full state honours
content: Though Bhosle’s family had requested fans to refrain from large gatherings at the cremation site, the queue at Shivaji Park stretched for several hundred metres.

title: BJP manifestos: 28.73% of promises made by party in poll-bound States rely on Centre
content: Banking on Modi-led government at the Centre, BJP has made tall promises on infrastructure, health, education in Kerala, Assam, Puducherry and West Bengal

title: Finally, streetlights start functioning on NH 150 stretch in Yadgir
content: All these years, there was absolute darkness at night on the stretch from the government degree college to the Deputy Commissioner’s office

title: West Asia crisis, Indian Ocean Region deployments to dominate Navy Commanders’ meet
content: The deliberations are expected to reinforce the Indian Navy’s role as a ‘preferred security partner’ in the Indian Ocean Region and the wider Indo-Pacific maritime region

title: US-Iran-Israel War LIVE Updates: Deadline Ends For Trump's Hormuz Naval Blockade, Iranian Ports
content: US-Iran-Israel War LIVE: US President Donald Trump said that Iran "lies" as they had promised to open the Strait of Hormuz but did not.

title: US Called Netanyahu From Islamabad. He Says, "The Explosion Came From..."
content: The call, according to Benjamin Netanyahu, was made by JD Vance from his plane en route back from the Pakistani capital.

title: NATO Allies Refuse To Join Trump's Strait of Hormuz Blockade Plan
content: NATO allies including Britain and France said they would not be drawn into the conflict by taking part in the blockade, saying instead that it was vital to open the waterway through which one-fifth of the world's oil usually passes.

title: The Complex Role Of Hezbollah As Lebanon-Israel Diplomacy Intensifies
content: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun last week decried Hezbollah for showing "no regard for the interests of Lebanon or the lives of its people."

title: The Dhanbad Bathroom Horror: Two Brothers, One Dead Sister
content: Lipika Kumari's half-burnt body was recovered four days after her death at her home in Jharkhand. The two brothers' conflicting accounts deepen the mystery surrounding the woman's death.

title: Exclusive: Strait Open For India, US "Miscalculated", Iran's Envoy Tells NDTV
content: Iran's Ambassador to India Mohammad Fathali warned of consequences that would extend well beyond the US and Iran as the American blockade starts taking shape in the Persian Gulf

title: Green Corridor On Delhi-Dehradun Expressway Ensures Safe Wildlife Transit
content: The corridor is not merely a road project but a transformative infrastructure initiative that establishes fast, safe, and highly reliable connectivity between Uttarakhand, Delhi, and Western Uttar Pradesh.

title: Punjab Assembly Passes Strict Sacrilege Law, Amends 2008 Act
content: To ensure strict punishment for those who commit sacrilege against the Guru Granth Sahib, the "Jagat Jot Sri Guru Granth Sahib Sataar Amendment Bill, 2026" was unanimously passed today during a special session of the Punjab Legislative Assembly.

title: Delhi Court's "Hope You Don't Return" Comment To Arvind Kejriwal
content: Kejriwal and the others discharged in the liquor policy case have sought the recusal of Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma from hearing a petition by the Central Bureau of Investigation against the trial court's decision. The court has accepted Kejriwal's

title: Trump Family Deal Spree Could Open Door For Presidents To Profit From Office
content: The family real estate business is undergoing the fastest overseas expansion since its founding a century ago, each deal potentially shaping everything from tariffs to military aid.

title: Hormuz Blockade + Limited Strikes On Iran: Trump's Plan After Pakistan Talks Fail
content: These additional measures come as options to break the current impasse in efforts to reach a lasting agreement with Tehran, following the collapse of direct negotiations in Pakistan over the weekend.

title: Police Bust Illegal Entry Network In Assam, 4 Bangladeshi Nationals Detained
content: During the investigation, police revealed that the group had crossed the border on April 10 in search of work after being lured by brokers and reached Guwahati on April 11.

title: No Supreme Court Relief For Bengal Voters Deleted In SIR Process
content: SIR Hearing In Supreme Court, West Bengal Elections: No Supreme Court Relief For Bengal Voters Deleted In SIR Process

title: 2016 Breakthrough To 2026 High-Stakes Battle: Bengal's Kharagpur Remains Complex Turf
content: An electoral contest in Kharagpur is not a linear battle, but rather a complex struggle layered with multiple dimensions.

title: Cars Burnt, Roads Blocked: Haryana Move Sparks Noida Workers' Protest
content: Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath has directed authorities to take strict action against anti-social elements trying to instigate workers.

title: Delhi-Dehradun Expressway: Route, Travel Time, Features Explained
content: Built at an estimated cost of around Rs 12,000 crore, the Delhi-Dehradun Expressway will begin near the Akshardham Temple in Delhi and end in Dehradun.

title: Punjab To Add Over 1,260 Buses To State Fleet Under Kilometre Scheme: Minister
content: The minister said, "PRTC is currently going through an active tender process to procure an additional 309 standard buses alongside 100 Midi buses, ensuring a comprehensive upgrade to the regional transport infrastructure.

content: This was the first time ever that all three major political outfits have technically ended up with the same person as their potential candidate on paper

title: Coal stock adequate for 90 days available: Union Coal Minister Kishan Reddy
content: The government is preparing an action plan to extract critical minerals from refrigerators, air-conditioners and others by collecting scrap from every town, Mr. Reddy said

content: Chief Minister to formally inaugurate the second phase of Anna Canteens on April 15 at Dharanikota in the Pedakurapadu constituency of Palnadu district

title: Who should challenge for Carlos Ulberg's championship first?
content: Carlos Ulberg knocked out former champion Ji Procházka in the first round at uFC 327 to claim the title in his 10th consecutive victory . the only problem is that he also appeared to have suffered a leg injury that could put his immediate title defense in jeopardy . here are some possible scenarios for Ulberg and athletes who earned statement wins in Miami .

title: WNBA trade grades: Grading Sky's latest move, Rickea Jackson's fit
content: it has been a busy week of WNBA free agency . it started off when Angel Reese was traded to the Atlanta Dream . the sky finished tied for last in the league at 10-34 . veteran guard Ariel Atkins is headed back to LA .

title: Only Klopp, Luis Enrique can fix Real Madrid ... and that's a problem
content: real madrid face bayern munich in the second leg of their UEFA Champions League quarterfinal second leg . they are nine points adrift of laLiga leaders Barcelona and were knocked out of the Copa del Rey in the round of 16 against second-tier albacete . but if they fail to overturn a 2-1 deficit away at Bayern, they will face a second successive season without a major trophy .

title: Fight grades: Nearly every UFC 327 bout exceeds expectations
content: the fight card was filled with drama, comebacks, a retirement and an unlikely frontrunner for fight of the year . it was one lousy fight on the card ( Dominick Reyes vs. Johnny Walker ). it will be largely forgotten thanks to Carlos Ulberg's knock out of Ji Procházka .

title: The case for the Ted Lindsay Award as the NHL's MVP trophy of record
content: Connor McDavid scored a hat trick in a win over San Jose . the Hart Trophy shouldn't be the MVP trophy of record in the NHL . he wants the Lindsay to be considered the top MVP award .
